description: An investment analyst needs to determine the valuation of a standalone battery storage asset based on its potential future revenues.

nodes.task_description: Forecast the asset's potential revenue streams for the next 10 years, including energy arbitrage and ancillary services.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent produces a detailed annual revenue forecast.

nodes.task_description: Model the asset's operational costs, including battery degradation and maintenance.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a forecast of annual operational expenditures.

nodes.task_description: Perform a discounted cash flow (DCF) analysis to calculate the Net Present Value (NPV) of the asset.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent provides a final valuation for the battery storage system.
